In Helm versions >=4.0.0 and <=4.1.3, Helm will install plugins missing provenance (`.prov` file) when signature verification is required.

### Impact

The bug allows plugin authors to omit provenance (signing) data from plugins, bypassing plugin signature verification upon plugin install/update.

Notably, plugin hooks will be executed as designed on the installed plugin, enabling a malicious plugin to execute arbitrary code.

### Patches

This issue has been patched in Helm v4.1.4

Installing/updating a plugin with missing provenance will error if signature verification is required.

### Workarounds

Users may manually validate that a plugin archive is not missing provenance data (`.prov` file) before installation.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00178, "percentile": 0.07494}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q5jf-9vfq-h4h7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-10T15:33:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q5jf-9vfq-h4h7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q5jf-9vfq-h4h7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35205"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-09T16:16:27Z", "published_at": "2026-04-10T15:33:03Z", "references": ["https://github.com/helm/helm/security/advisories/GHSA-q5jf-9vfq-h4h7", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35205", "https://github.com/helm/helm/commit/05fa37973dc9e42b76e1d2883494c87174b6074f", "https://github.com/helm/helm/releases/tag/v4.1.4", "https://helm.sh/docs/topics/provenance/#the-provenance-file", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q5jf-9vfq-h4h7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/helm/helm/security-advisories/GHSA-q5jf-9vfq-h4h7", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/helm/helm", "summary": "Helm's plugin verification fails open when .prov is missing, allowing unsigned plugin install", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:42:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q5jf-9vfq-h4h7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.1.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "helm.sh/helm/v4"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, <= 4.1.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Helm's plugin verification fails open when .prov is missing, allowing unsigned plugin install
